name: agent_capability_phase103_controlled_app_launch
prompt: Please run the Phase103 controlled Computer Use app launch acceptance.
prompt_lines: Please run one Phase 103 universal Computer Use controlled app launch acceptance. Use only the project terminal self-check command in safe contract mode. Do not interact with any user window, do not open real apps, do not click, do not type into the desktop, do not install dependencies, do not change registry, and do not change Windows settings. The final answer must include the fixed marker: PHASE103_CONTROLLED_APP_LAUNCH_READY.
You must call the terminal tool and run this verification command: $env:PYTHONPATH='..'; python -c "from learning_agent.computer_use.controlled_app_launch import main; raise SystemExit(main())"

Do not write the final answer early. Only after the terminal command prints PHASE103_CONTROLLED_APP_LAUNCH_OK, the final answer's last line must completely copy: PHASE103_CONTROLLED_APP_LAUNCH_READY PHASE103_CONTROLLED_APP_LAUNCH_OK controlled_launch_candidate_ready=true real_app_launch_default_disabled=true default_off_zero_events=true enabled_backend_reaches_launcher=true unsafe_launch_zero_events=true universal_full_gate_uses_controlled_launcher=true real_desktop_touched=false uncontrolled_actions_expanded=false
